params.subject: The user to apply decay to

params.subjects: Array of users to apply decay to

returns.found: Whether the reason was found in recent history
returns.timestamp: When the reason was last used (0 if not found)

getActiveEndorsements(address).details: Filters out expired or zero-weight endorsements to keep UI simple

returns.daysInactive: Number of days since last activity

params.subject: The user to get breakdown for

returns.recentChanges: Last 10 score changes (or fewer if less history)

returns.canBeMerchant: Whether user can be a merchant
returns.canVote: Whether user can participate in governance

requestScoreReview(string).details: DAO will review and can adjust score if warranted

params.reason: Explanation for why you believe your score is incorrect

params.subject: The user whose dispute is being resolved

params.active: True to grant, false to revoke
params.subject: The user address

params.active: True to grant, false to revoke
params.badge: The badge ID to set for all subjects

params.perMonth: Score points lost per month toward neutral
params.startDays: Days of inactivity before decay begins

params.authorized: True to authorize, false to revoke

params._paused: True to pause, false to unpause

applyDecay(address).notice: Apply decay to a user's stored score (callable by anyone, gas refund opportunity)

applyDecayBatch(address[]).notice: Batch apply decay to multiple users (keeper function)

calculateAutomatedScore(address).notice: Automated ProofScore calculation based on behavioral metrics

calculateOnChainScore(address).notice: Calculate score from on-chain sources only

findReasonInHistory(address,string).notice: Check if a specific reason was used in recent score changes

getActiveEndorsements(address).notice: Return active endorsements for a subject

getDecayAdjustedScore(address).notice: Calculate decay-adjusted score for a user

getScore(address).notice: Returns current ProofScore combining DAO-set and on-chain sources

getScoreBreakdown(address).notice: Get score breakdown showing component contributions

getScoreHistory(address).notice: Get score history for a user

getScoreSourceCount().notice: Get number of active score sources

getScores(address[]).notice: Batch fetch scores for a list of addresses (returns NEUTRAL for unset)

getScoresBatch(address[]).notice: Batch query scores for multiple users (gas efficient for UIs)

getUserStatus(address).notice: Get comprehensive user status including decay

isBadgeValid(address,bytes32).notice: Check if a badge is valid (not expired)

requestScoreReview(string).notice: Request a review of your ProofScore

reward(address,uint16,string).notice: Light-weight behavior hooks (can be called by authorized modules).

setBadge(address,bytes32,bool,uint256).notice: Set or clear a badge for a user (DAO-only)

setBadgeBatch(address[],bytes32,bool,uin.notice: L-3 Fix: Batch set badges for gas efficiency

setDAO(address).notice: Transfer DAO control to a new address (for DAO migration)

setDecentralizationWeights(uint8,uint8).notice: Set the balance between DAO-set and on-chain scores

setOperator(address,bool).notice: Set operator status for an address (allows calling reward/punish)

setOperatorLimits(uint16,uint16).notice: DAO can set operator rate limits

setScore(address,uint16,string).notice: DAO can directly set scores for migrations or rectifications.
